headline: NRG Energy (NRG) Stock Looks Undervalued On Its 261% Five Year Run
summary: After a strong multi year run, NRG Energy now sits at a much higher share price, yet the stock still screens as undervalued on the broader valuation checks, even as short term performance has cooled and analysts publish bullish targets. NRG Energy has returned about 261% over the past 5 years, which puts long term holders in a very strong position and raises the bar for any new upside case. Analyst enthusiasm around NRG Energy's diversified power generation and retail energy platform can...
